case_title: DAEDALUS WINGS, INC. VS. OLIVE MEDIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,228.59 FILED BY DAEDALUS WINGS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVE MEDIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-17-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVE MEDIA, INC.
